description: scaffold a complete LightningModule (training/validation/test/predict steps + configure_optimizers) boilerplate
rules: read-only: produces a local .py scaffold, never trains or mutates remote state
scaffold source is written to record_store/${OUT_NAME}; validation stdout goes to scaffold_module.log
emitting the template needs no heavy lib; the optional validation run needs lightning + torch installed
usage: Set OUT_NAME (the .py filename to write). Output: record_store/${OUT_NAME} + scaffold_module.log.
limitation: Emits boilerplate only — it does not run training. Editing the placeholder network / loss is left to the caller.
